arts.ttl: Supercomputer predicts Premier League title race with Liverpool eight points clear
arts.sum: As many as seven clubs have a statistically significant chance of winning the Premier League title according to Opta's supercomputer.

arts.ttl: Liverpool sweat over Trent Alexander-Arnold and four others ahead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arne Slot has a number of difficult selection decisions to make ahead of Liverpool's Champions League clash with Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Madrid's Liverpool clash will test Perez's Super League claims
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Champions League clash vs. Liverpool isn't only about progressing to the knockouts, but also proving a point about the proposed Super League.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah future: Liverpool star's contract comments slammed by Jamie Carragher
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has been branded "selfish" by fellow Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher over comments recently made with regards to his contract situation at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Mohamed Salah in 'positive' contract talks with Premier League leaders
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah's agent reportedly holds "positive" contract talks with Liverpool, despite recent comments made by the Egyptian star.

arts.ttl: How Real Madrid’s Mbappé stood up Champions League rivals Liverpool
arts.sum: It was 2022, and the Frenchman had just renewed his contract with PSG, but the Reds had done as much to secure his signing as Real Madrid had. The forward wanted to leave and sought a short-term contract with Liverpool before eventually moving to Real Madrid .

arts.ttl: Florentino Pérez: ‘Real Madrid’s academy is the best in the world’
arts.sum: Real Madrid president Florentino Pérez has revealed his take that the club’s academy setup is the very best in world football, in comments which will no doubt spark chatter behind…

arts.ttl: 'The switch' - Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold sparks transfer fear after new message
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is yet to sign a new contract with Liverpool but has sent a message on Instagram

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher hits out at 'clown' Liverpool fan after backlash over Mohamed Salah comments
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher claimed that Mo Salah's demands over new contract talks with Liverpool were "selfish" on Sky Sports' Monday Night Football before he faced a backlash online

arts.ttl: ‘We can trust them’ – Carlo Ancelotti praises two seldom-used Real Madrid stars
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has moved to reveal his appreciation for the efforts of two of the lesser-seen members of his squad. This comes owing to their respective…
